NoteList.emptyFilterHint: Try changing your search or filter criteria
NoteList.emptyCreateHint: Press "+" to create a new note

errors.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving the note

NoteEditorForm.offlineHint: You are offline — changes will be saved locally and synced when you reconnect

DeleteConfirmDialog.title: Confirm deletion
DeleteConfirmDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete the note "{noteTitle}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

ProfileEditor.editHint: Click the edit icon next to any field to change it
ProfileEditor.usernameHelperText: Lowercase letters, digits and symbols (. _ -) only — no spaces

passwordErrors.newTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
passwordErrors.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
passwordErrors.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current one

usernameErrors.tooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
usernameErrors.hasSpaces: Spaces are not allowed in usernames
usernameErrors.invalidChars: Username may only contain lowercase letters (a-z), digits, and symbols (. _ -)

ProfileEditor.languagePrefHint: Your saved preference is applied when you log in. Use the language toggle in the app bar to change the session language.
ProfileEditor.offlineReadOnly: You are offline — your data is read-only. Editing will be available when you reconnect.

DeleteAccountDialog.title: Delete account
DeleteAccountDialog.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Your account and all your notes will be deleted.
DeleteAccountDialog.offlineDisabled: Account deletion is unavailable while offline

errors.passwordRequired: Password is required to confirm account deletion

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.dangerWarning: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. All your notes will be deleted.

NoteDetailPage.audioUnsupported: Your browser does not support audio playback

LocaleSwitchPrompt.title: Switch session language
LocaleSwitchPrompt.body: Your saved preference is {lang}. Do you want to switch to it now?

OfflineBanner.offlineMessage: You are offline — browsing cached notes

ConnectionStatus.offlineDescription: Browse mode — changes will sync later
ConnectionStatus.notTrustedHint: Go to Profile to add this device to trusted devices
ConnectionStatus.hasFailuresWarning: Some operations failed — will retry on next sync

DeviceManager.title: Trusted Devices
DeviceManager.hint: Add trusted devices to use as a Progressive Web App (PWA)
DeviceManager.confirmRemoveBody: This will remove the device and cancel its push notification subscription. Continue?
DeviceManager.currentNotTrusted: This device is not trusted — click the button below to add it
DeviceManager.passwordHint: Enter your password to confirm this action
DeviceManager.trustConfirmBody: This device will be added as trusted, allowing you to install the app and enable notifications. Enter your password to confirm.

PushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
PushNotifications.hint: Receive a notification when a new device signs into your account
PushNotifications.unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications
PushNotifications.denied: Notification permission denied — enable it in browser settings
PushNotifications.requiresServiceWorker: Push notifications are only available when the Service Worker is active
PushNotifications.requiresTrust: You must trust this device first to enable notifications — go to the Active Devices section below

DeviceTrustPrompt.title: Trust this device?
DeviceTrustPrompt.body: Would you like to add this device as a trusted device?
DeviceTrustPrompt.benefits: Trusted devices can install the app as a Progressive Web App (PWA) and receive push notifications.
DeviceTrustPrompt.laterHint: You can trust the device later from your profile settings
